vocab.meaning: leo lên các nấc thang sự nghiệp (thăng tiến trong công ty)
vocab.example: I am currently working as a junior analyst, with a long-term goal to climb the corporate ladder within the financial sector.

vocab.meaning: chương trình học thuật khắt khe/nặng
vocab.example: Being a medical student involves dealing with a rigorous academic curriculum that leaves very little room for leisure.

vocab.meaning: có được kinh nghiệm thực tế
vocab.example: I opted for a part-time job alongside my studies to gain hands-on experience in the hospitality industry.

vocab.meaning: một công việc/nhiệm vụ to lớn và gây nản lòng
vocab.example: Completing my PhD has been a daunting undertaking, requiring immense dedication and late-night research.

vocab.meaning: hội thảo phát triển chuyên môn
vocab.example: My employer frequently sponsors my attendance at professional development workshops to keep my skills up to date.

vocab.meaning: giáo dục bậc cao (đại học/cao đẳng)
vocab.example: I am currently in my second year of tertiary education, majoring in International Relations.
In my line of work, there is stiff competition for senior roles, so I’m always looking for ways to stand out.

vocab.word: bridge the gap between theory and practice
vocab.ipa: /brɪdʒ ðə ɡæp bɪˈtwiːn ˈθɪri ənd ˈpræktɪs/
vocab.meaning: thu hẹp khoảng cách giữa lý thuyết và thực hành
vocab.example: My internship was invaluable because it helped me bridge the gap between theory and practice in civil engineering.

vocab.meaning: cơ hội thăng tiến nghề nghiệp
vocab.example: I moved to this company specifically because they offer much better career advancement opportunities for young professionals.
I take great pride in my scholastic achievements, especially winning the dean’s list award last semester.
